title: Glacial Ignis
description: A 'Ice and Fire' mod & addon retexture inspired by Frostbite Brimstone.
body:
### I am aware that Frostbite Brimstone updated. However updating this pack to match to FB&BS's new look will take a lot of time, and so there will not be an update anytime soon. Thank you for understanding.

### This pack requires **__[Frostbite Brimstone](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/frostbiteandbrimstone).__**
### This pack should be loaded **__below__** Frostbite Brimstone.
If its loaded above, some textures may not work properly.

This resource pack retextures Ice and Fire and the addons of Ice and Fire. You can find the full list of currently supported addons below.

It is inspired off of Frostbite Brimstone, a Ice and Fire resource pack by Ron.

This resourcepack is still a work in process, and does not change all textures.
![Sprites of Dragonbone weapons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XqlpDLlP/images/fdca77b7461180735c84110152d3b7c97e7593ef.jpeg)

### List of Supported Mods
- [Spartan Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry-ice-and-fire)
- [Dragon Finder](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragon-finder)
- [Eyes of Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/eyes-of-ice-and-fire)
- [Eye of Dragons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eye-of-dragons/)
